chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-622 of 2024 Naseer Ahmed Versus Mrs. Riyasat Begum & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.3009/24 2. For orders on Misc. No.3010/24 3. For orders on Misc. No.3011/24 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 07.02.2024 Mr. Masood Ahmed Qazi for petitioner. -.-.- Petitioner has filed this petition in relation to an order passed in Revision Application No.104 of 2023 which Revision Application assailed the order passed on objections of the petitioner filed in the process when auction proceedings were taken up. It seems that the decree was passed in a suit for administration, which was not executed until next three years. The property perhaps was reevaluated, though there was no reason for such reevaluation. Be that as it may, against such reevaluation, the objections were preferred by the petitioner which were declined and so also the Revision Application. It seems that the decree is to be executed strictly in terms as required and once the execution application is filed, Order XXI CPC will take its recourse. At the time when the property is put to auction Nazir or any other auctioneer shall take into consideration the provisions of Order XXI CPC or any other enabling provision of law. No interference as such is required in the orders passed by the two Courts below and the petition is accordingly dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
